steps.t: The Nink-hai powder kegs can be found within their camp, east of Faldham.
The Nink-hai powder kegs can be found within the Orc camp east of Faldham. You plan to disrupt the Nink-hai plans by detonating their stores of danger…
Langfrith can be found outside the meadhall of Faldham. Langfrith awaits the results of your actions with the Nink-hai powder kegs.
